title: chrysolaena obovata
intro: Chrysolaena obovata, also known as the Brazilian mint, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Brazil. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Chrysolaena obovata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Chrysolaena obovata can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
